arts.ttl: Jack Grealish takes part in Pepsi's new jungle-themed guessing game - after hinting he may go on I'm A Celeb to Ant and Dec
arts.sum: Man City's Jack Grealish has dropped yet another hint that he may one day take part in ITV's hit reality TV show I'm A Celebrity Get Me Out Of Here, after starring in a new jungle-themed Pepsi advert.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Kyle Walker travelling to 'formalise' AC Milan move with defender set to undergo medical
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Kyle Walker is reportedly flying to Italy to finalise his move to Serie A giants AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Man City sign Lens defender Khusanov until 2029
arts.sum: Manchester City sign Lens and Uzbekistan centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov on a four-and-a-half-year contract until 2029.

arts.ttl: Man City's Jack Grealish 'being closely monitored' by two major European clubs
arts.sum: Two major European clubs are reportedly keeping a close eye on Jack Grealish's situation at Manchester City, with the attacker struggling to gain regular playing time.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker expected in Italy on Tuesday ahead of move from Man City to AC Milan - after agreeing two-and-a-half year deal with Serie A giants
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The 34-year-old has been negotiating to leave City on a free ahead of agreeing a two and a half year deal with the Serie A side.

arts.ttl: Man City players have found their joy - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his team have rediscovered the "joy" in their job after a 6-0 Premier League win over Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: PSG Talking Podcast: The Manchester City Preview With The Blue Moon Podcast
arts.sum: Alex Pantling/Getty Images Subscribe to the PSG Talking podcast. The post PSG Talking Podcast: The Manchester City Preview With The Blue Moon Podcast appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Chelsea 3-1 Wolves: Blues score two second-half goals in five minutes to climb above Man City into fourth... as Noni Madueke strikes again after netting hat-trick at Molineux in August
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: At last, victory for Chelsea , and one which was inspired by their own as Trevoh Chalobah made sure Stamford Bridge could finally celebrate.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Seek £30M-Rated Serie A Standout as Alternative After Nuno Mendes Track Hits Dead End
arts.sum: The January transfer window presents Ruben Amorim with his first chance to mold Manchester United in line with his vision. While bigger changes are expected in the summer, reports indicate Amorim has already set his sights on a key player from Paris Saint-Germain. Manuel Ugarte, one of PSG’s summer signings, has thrived under Amorim’s leadership […] The post Man Utd Seek £30M-Rated Serie A Standout as Alternative After Nuno Mendes Track Hits Dead End appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne provides update on Man City contract talks following Erling Haaland's recent renewal
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne provides an update on talks over a new Manchester City contract after entering the final six months of his current deal.
